days.title: Arrival at Leh Airport | Acclimatization Day
activities: Welcome to The Land of High Passes! The group will assemble at the airport from where, a designated vehicle will drop you at your hotel.
We will check into our designated hotel. The rest of the day is at leisure and travelers are strictly advised to acclimatize for a safe journey ahead.
Keep yourself hydrated, indulge in minimal physical activities and acclimatize properly.
Dinner and overnight stay in Leh.

days.title: Leh local sight seeing.
activities: Post breakfast, we’ll head out for our local sightseeing tour.
We will visit the Sangam site in the Leh region where the Zanskar river meets the Indus river to form a beautiful confluence.

We will also visit other tourist attractions such as Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, Magnetic hill which is an anti-gravity hill as well as The Hall of Fame which is a war memorial maintained by the Indian Army.
The last stop on our sightseeing tour is the iconic Shanti Stupa known for its beautiful white dome shape, statues, and intricate carvings.
In the evening, travelers can indulge in Cafe Hopping, Local Shopping and buying unique souvenirs.
We will return to our Hotel where dinner will be served in the evening followed by an overnight stay in Leh.
Highlights of the day: Sangam, Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, Magnetic Hill, The Hall of Fame, Shanti Stupa.

days.title: Leh to Nubra.(162 kms, 6 hrs of drive)
activities: Post breakfast, we’ll head out for Nubra Valley.
En-route, we will be traversing through one of the Highest Motorable Roads in the World, Khardung La (18,380 Ft) which offers magnificent views of towering mountains.
Upon reaching Nubra Valley, travelers can indulge in a Double Hump Bactrian Camel Ride, ATV rides, and more. (on personal expense)
After indulging in thrill filled activities, travelers will check-in into their campsites.
Dinner will be served followed by an overnight stay in Nubra Valley.

days.title: Nubra to Pangong. (280 kms, 8 hrs of drive)
activities: Post-breakfast, we’ll check out from our campsite and head towards Pangong Lake.
En-route, we will visit the Diskit Monastery, popular for the 100ft tall colorful statue of Buddha.

After paying our reverence at the monastery, we will resume our journey towards Pangong, the iconic lake that has gained popularity ever since featuring in the Bollywood blockbuster movies like 3 Idiots and Jab tak hai Jaan.
Upon reaching Pangong, we will check in to our cottages, explore the lakeside and catch a beautiful sunset.
At night, you can enjoy a warm meal with your friends and capture stunning views of the night sky.

days.title: Pangong to Tso-Moriri (180 Kms)
activities: Good morning with a view! After a nutritious breakfast, we'll head towards Tso- Moriri, a sacred site for Ladakhi people and one of the highest lakes in India with an altitude of 14,836 ft.
En-route, you may even get a glimpse of rare birds like the black-necked crane and bar-headed geese.
After spending a blissful afternoon by the lake, exploring its beauty and simply absorbing the peace, we’ll head to our campsites near the lake.
At night, you can catch glimpses of the night sky and indulge in group bonding sessions.
Dinner and an overnight stay at Tso Moriri.
Highlights of the day: Tso Moriri Exploration

days.title: Tsomoriri Lake to Leh (225 kms, 7 hrs dive)
activities: After early morning breakfast, we will start our return journey to Leh.

En route, we will visit the Shey Palace which is popular for its 12-meter-tall gold-gilded statue of Buddha. We will also pay our respects at Thiksey Monastery, which is the largest Monastery in Central Ladakh.
Upon our arrival, we’ll check into our designated stay. The rest of the day is at leisure. Dinner followed by an overnight stay in Leh.

days.title: Departure to Leh Airport | Tour Ends
activities: After early Breakfast, checkout from Hotel & get transferred to Airport for onward flight back home.
Tour concludes with lifetime memories of Ladakh.

days.title: Arrival at Leh Airport +Acclimatization Only
activities: Welcome to The Land of High Passes! The group will assemble at the airport from where, a designated vehicle will drop you at your hotel.
We will check into our designated hotel. The rest of the day is at leisure and travelers are strictly advised to acclimatize for a safe journey ahead.
Keep yourself hydrated, indulge in minimal physical activities and acclimatize properly.
Dinner and overnight stay in Leh.

days.title: Leh City Tour
activities: Post breakfast, we’ll head out for our local sightseeing tour.
We will visit the Sangam site in the Leh region where the Zanskar river meets the Indus river to form a beautiful confluence.

We will also visit other tourist attractions such as Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, Magnetic hill which is an anti-gravity hill as well as The Hall of Fame which is a war memorial maintained by the Indian Army.
The last stop on our sightseeing tour is the iconic Shanti Stupa known for its beautiful white dome shape, statues, and intricate carvings.
In the evening, travelers can indulge in Cafe Hopping, Local Shopping and buying unique souvenirs.
We will return to our Hotel where dinner will be served in the evening followed by an overnight stay in Leh.
Highlights of the day: Sangam, Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, Magnetic Hill, The Hall of Fame, Shanti Stupa.

days.title: Leh to Nubra
activities: Post breakfast, we’ll head out for Nubra Valley.
En-route, we will be traversing through one of the Highest Motorable Roads in the World, Khardung La (18,380 Ft) which offers magnificent views of towering mountains.
Upon reaching Nubra Valley, travelers can indulge in a Double Hump Bactrian Camel Ride, ATV rides, and more. (on personal expense)
After indulging in thrill filled activities, travelers will check-in into their campsites.
Dinner will be served followed by an overnight stay in Nubra Valley.
Highlights of the day: Khardung La, Hunder, Nubra Valley.

days.title: Nubra to Turtuk, night stay in Turtuk
activities: Rise and Shine! Today, we'll be heading out to Turtuk which is the last village of India on the Indo-Pak border renowned for its apricots.
Upon our arrival in Turtuk, we’ll spend some time exploring the beautiful village on foot. Sun bask by Shyok River, explore the nearby Balti Museum and relish in surreal views.
We'll head back to Nubra by the evening where we'll have dinner followed by an overnight stay.

days.title: Nubra Valley to Pangong (180 Kms)
activities: Post-breakfast, we’ll check out from our campsite and head towards Pangong Lake.
En-route, we will visit the Diskit Monastery, popular for the 100ft tall colorful statue of Buddha.

After paying our reverence at the monastery, we will resume our journey towards Pangong, the iconic lake that has gained popularity ever since featuring in the Bollywood blockbuster movies like 3 Idiots and Jab tak hai Jaan.
Upon reaching Pangong, we will check in to our cottages, explore the lakeside and catch a beautiful sunset.
At night, you can enjoy a warm meal with your friends and capture stunning views of the night sky.
Highlights of the day: Diskit Monastery, Pangong Lake, Stargazing

days.title: Pangong to Tso-Moriri (180 Kms)
activities: Good morning with a view! After a nutritious breakfast, we'll head towards Tso- Moriri, a sacred site for Ladakhi people and one of the highest lakes in India with an altitude of 14,836 ft.
En-route, you may even get a glimpse of rare birds like the black-necked crane and bar-headed geese.
After spending a blissful afternoon by the lake, exploring its beauty and simply absorbing the peace, we’ll head to our campsites near the lake.
At night, you can catch glimpses of the night sky and indulge in group bonding sessions.
Dinner and an overnight stay at Tso Moriri.
Highlights of the day: Tso Moriri Exploration

days.title: Tso- Moriri to Leh (220 Kms)
activities: After early morning breakfast, we will start our return journey to Leh.

En route, we will visit the Shey Palace which is popular for its 12-meter-tall gold-gilded statue of Buddha. We will also pay our respects at Thiksey Monastery, which is the largest Monastery in Central Ladakh.
Upon our arrival, we’ll check into our designated stay. The rest of the day is at leisure. Dinner followed by an overnight stay in Leh.
Highlights of the day: Shey Palace, Thiksey Monastery.

days.title: Departure to Leh Airport | Tour Ends
activities: Have an early breakfast at the hotel.
Complete the check-out formalities at the hotel.
Our representative will drop you at Leh Airport for your onward journey.
Bid farewell to Ladakh with cherished memories as you board your flight back home.

days.title: Arrival in Srinagar
activities: Arrive in Srinagar, the summer capital of Jammu & Kashmir.
Check-in to your hotel and relax after your journey.
Enjoy a serene Shikara ride on Dal Lake (optional) or take a leisurely stroll through the lush Mughal Gardens and Shalimar Bagh.
Savor a delicious traditional Kashmiri meal before resting for the night.
Overnight stay in Srinagar.
Places Covered: Dal Lake, Mughal Gardens, Shalimar Bagh

days.title: Srinagar to Kargil (200 km)
activities: After an early breakfast, check out and embark on a scenic drive to Kargil.
Witness breathtaking views as you traverse the Zoji La Pass.
En route, stop at the Drass War Memorial, a tribute to the brave soldiers of the Kargil War.
Upon arrival in Kargil, check in to your hotel and take a short walk around the town.
Overnight stay in Kargil.
Places Covered: Zoji La Pass, Drass War Memorial, Kargil Town

days.title: Kargil to Leh via Lamayuru (215 km)
activities: Post breakfast, continue your journey to Leh.
Stop at the ancient Lamayuru Monastery, one of the oldest in Ladakh, and marvel at the surreal moon-like landscape of Moonland.
Experience the famous Magnetic Hill, where vehicles appear to roll uphill.
Arrive in Leh, check-in at the hotel, and enjoy an evening at leisure exploring Leh’s markets and cafes.
Overnight stay in Leh.
Places Covered: Lamayuru Monastery, Moonland, Magnetic Hill

days.title: Leh City Tour
activities: After breakfast, start your Leh exploration with a visit to the Hall of Fame, a museum showcasing the Indian Army’s history and valor.
Seek blessings at Pathar Sahib Gurudwara, a revered Sikh shrine.
Witness the incredible confluence of the Indus and Zanskar Rivers at Sangam Point.
End your day with panoramic views of Leh from the Shanti Stupa before heading back for dinner.
Overnight stay in Leh.
Places Covered: Hall of Fame, Shanti Stupa, Pathar Sahib Gurudwara, Sangam Point, Leh Market

days.title: Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La
activities: Fuel up with an early breakfast before heading to Nubra Valley via the thrilling Khardung La Pass (5,359 meters), one of the world’s highest motorable roads.
Upon arrival in Hunder, check in to your hotel and explore the sand dunes of Nubra, where you can opt for a camel safari (self-paid) on the rare double-humped Bactrian camels.
Visit a nearby monastery before enjoying a peaceful night in the valley.
Overnight stay in Hunder.
Places Covered: Khardung La Pass, Nubra Valley, Sand Dunes, Hunder Monastery

days.title: Nubra Valley to Turtuk and Back
activities: Wake up to a mesmerizing sunrise in Nubra.
After breakfast, embark on a drive to Turtuk, a remote village near the India-Pakistan border.
Explore the unique Balti culture, visit ancient monasteries, and enjoy breathtaking landscapes.
Return to Hunder by evening and relax at your accommodation.
Overnight stay in Hunder.
Places Covered: Turtuk Village, Balti Culture, Nubra Valley

days.title: Nubra Valley to Pangong Lake via Shyok Valley
activities: After breakfast, check out and drive through the remote and rugged Shyok Valley en route to Pangong Tso, one of Asia’s most mesmerizing lakes.
Arrive at Pangong Lake, famous for its ever-changing shades of blue and green, and soak in the breathtaking views.
Spend a tranquil evening by the lake before settling in for the night.
Overnight stay at Pangong (camp or guesthouse).
Places Covered: Shyok Valley, Pangong Tso

days.title: Pangong Lake to Leh (150 km )
activities: Wake up early to witness the magical sunrise over Pangong Lake.
Post breakfast, check out and drive back to Leh via Chang La Pass (5,350 meters).
Stop at Hemis Monastery, one of Ladakh’s largest monasteries, and the stunning Thiksey Monastery, known for its resemblance to Tibet’s Potala Palace.
Arrive in Leh by evening and explore the local market or relax at your hotel.
Overnight stay in Leh.
Places Covered: Pangong Lake, Chang La Pass, Hemis Monastery, Thiksey Monastery, Leh Market

days.title: Leh to Sarchu (250 km)
activities: Enjoy a hearty breakfast before checking out from the hotel.
Drive towards Sarchu, crossing the Tanglang La Pass (5,328 meters), the second-highest pass in Ladakh.
En route, witness the vast More Plains, an endless stretch of barren beauty.
Arrive in Sarchu and check into your campsite.
Overnight stay in Sarchu.
Places Covered: Tanglang La Pass, More Plains, Sarchu Campsite

days.title: Sarchu to Manali (222 km - 6-7 hours drive)
activities: Post breakfast, check out and continue your journey to Manali.
Cross Baralacha La Pass (4,890 meters) and the scenic Rohtang Pass (3,978 meters), offering stunning views.
Arrive in Manali by late afternoon, relax and explore the town.
Overnight stay in Manali.
Places Covered: Baralacha La Pass, Rohtang Pass, Manali Town

days.title: Manali to Delhi (12 hours drive or flight)
activities: Breakfast at the hotel. Drive to Delhi: Either take a 12-hour drive to Delhi or a flight from Bhuntar Airport to Delhi.
Arrival in Delhi: Reach Delhi and continue your onward journey.
Trip ends with amazing experiences!
Places Covered: Manali, Bhuntar Airport (if flying)

days.title: Arrival in Leh – Acclimatization Day
activities: Arrive in Leh, the capital of Ladakh.
Check-in to your hotel and relax to acclimatize to the high altitude.
You will experience the fresh mountain air and allow your body to adjust.
Enjoy meals and rest at the hotel.
Overnight stay in Leh.

days.title: Leh City Tour
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Visit Hall of Fame, a museum honoring the Indian Army's sacrifices—you will experience their bravery and dedication.
Explore Magnetic Hill, where you will witness vehicles appearing to defy gravity.
Visit Pathar Sahib Gurudwara, a Sikh shrine where you will experience deep spiritual significance.
Stop at Sangam Point, where you will witness the confluence of two mighty rivers.
Free time in the evening to explore Leh’s market and cafes.
Return to the hotel for dinner.
Overnight stay in Leh.
Places Covered:Hall of Fame, Shanti Stupa, Magnetic Hill, Pathar Sahib Gurudwara, and Sangam Point

days.title: Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Drive to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass (5,359 meters)—you will experience one of the world’s highest motorable roads.
Stop at Shanti Stupa en route, where you will enjoy stunning panoramic views of Leh.
Explore Nubra Valley, located between the Karakoram and Ladakh ranges—you will witness breathtaking landscapes.
Check-in at the hotel in Hunder.
Visit Sand Dunes (cold desert), where you will enjoy the surreal desert scenery and opt for a camel safari (self-paid).
Explore the Monastery nearby, where you will immerse yourself in the rich Buddhist heritage.
Return to the hotel for dinner.
Overnight stay in Hunder.

days.title: Nubra Valley to Turtuk and Back
activities: Watch a beautiful sunrise and have breakfast.
Day trip to Turtuk, a picturesque village where you will experience the unique culture of the Balti people.
Explore the village and soak in its charm.
Return to Diskit in the evening for dinner.
Overnight stay in Hunder.

days.title: Nubra Valley to Pangong Tso via Shyok Valley
activities: Breakfast at the hotel and check out.
Drive to Pangong Tso via Agam and Shyok villages, where you will witness untouched natural beauty.
Marvel at Pangong Tso, where you will see the lake's colors change throughout the day.
Enjoy the scenic beauty of the lake, surrounded by mountains.
Evening at leisure near the lake.
Dinner by the lakeside.
Overnight stay at Pangong.

days.title: Pangong Lake to Hanle
activities: Start early (7:00 AM) with breakfast and pack up for the drive to Hanle.
Drive through the scenic Changthang plateau, where you will witness vast barren landscapes and peaceful villages.
Arrive in Hanle by afternoon (around 2:00 PM). Check-in at your accommodation.
Visit Hanle Monastery, where you will experience a peaceful spiritual atmosphere, and the Indian Astronomical Observatory, one of the highest in the world.
Relax in the peaceful surroundings of this isolated village.
Return to your guesthouse or homestay for dinner.
Overnight stay in Hanle.

days.title: Umlingla Pass Excursion
activities: Start early with breakfast and ensure you have enough water, snacks, and warm clothing.
Drive through remote areas, where you will witness rugged landscapes and pristine beauty.
Arrive at Umlingla Pass, one of the highest motorable roads in the world, where you will enjoy breathtaking panoramic views.
Begin the return journey by early afternoon, reaching Hanle by evening
Have a relaxing dinner.
Overnight stay in Hanle.

days.title: Hanle to Tso Moriri via Chumathang
activities: Start early with breakfast and pack up for the drive to Tso Moriri.
Stop at Mahe Bridge and Chumathang Hot Springs, where you will witness bubbling hot water in the middle of the cold mountains.
Arrive at Tso Moriri by afternoon.
Enjoy a leisurely walk along the lakeshore, where you will experience the serene beauty of the blue waters and surrounding mountains.
Check-in to your accommodation (guesthouse or camp), enjoy a relaxing evening with dinner, and rest by the lakeside.
Overnight stay at Tso Moriri.

days.title: Tso Moriri to Leh
activities: Breakfast at the hotel and check out.
Drive back to Leh, passing through Puga Valley, where you will witness unique geothermal hot springs and mesmerizing landscapes.
Rest of the day at leisure to explore Leh, where you will experience the vibrant local culture, or for some last-minute shopping.
Overnight stay in Leh.

days.title: Departure from Leh
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Check-out and transfer to the airport.
Depart Leh with unforgettable memories of Ladakh’s breathtaking landscapes and warm hospitality until your next adventure!

days.title: Arrival at Leh Airport + Acclimatization Only
activities: Pick up from Leh Airport and proceeding for Hotel Check-in. Since you have arrived by air, it is strictly advised to relax & acclimatize with Leh altitude & weather today.
Take full day rest & gear up for upcoming journeys.
Dinner and overnight stay in Leh.

days.title: Leh City Tour
activities: Start towards Sham Valley in the morning after Breakfast- visiting Hall of fame, Spituk Monastery, the confluence of Indus & Zanskar River (Sangam), Gurudwara Sri Pathar Sahib, Magnetic Hill.
Return to Leh by evening. Have dinner and overnight stay in Leh.
*Consult our Tour Planner to add River Rafting adventure to this Trip.
days.highlight: Hall of fame, Spituk Monastery, confluence of Indus and Zanskar river, Gurudwara Sri Pathar Sahib, Magnetic Hill.

days.title: Leh to Nubra
activities: After Breakfast, we travel towards one of the Highest Motorable Road of The World, Khardung La Pass. Have a cup of Tea there, get yourself clicked with the Khardungla Signboard by BRO & proceed towards Nubra valley covering Diskit Monastery enroute.

Check-in at Hotel/Camp, freshen up & later you can have a Double Hump Bactarian Camel ride. Don't forget to click this unique mammal, found in the cold Desert. It was once used to carry the trade material on the silk route.
After dinner Overnight at Hunter/Nubra Camps/Hotel.
days.highlight: Double Hump Bactarian Camel ride, Deskit Monastery

days.title: Nubra to Pangong (250 kms)
activities: After Breakfast, check out from the camps & visit Diskit Monastery. If time permits you can also go for ATV ride (personal expense) and then continue further till Pangong via Shyok Valley.

Pangong Lake is one of the most beautiful & scenic high altitude saltwater lakes. The beauty of this place is such that various Bollywood movies have been shot around this lake. Another fact about the lake is that one-third of this lake is controlled by India & rest two-third lies under Chinese province. Check In to the campsite and later go for a stroll around Pangong Lake in the evening.
Overnight at camps in Pangong.
days.highlight: ATV ride (personal expense), Shyok Valley, Pangong lake

days.title: Pangong to TsoMoriri
activities: After Breakfast, check out from the stay after that proceed for Tso Moriri Lake.
Tso Moriri is another high altitude lake in the Ladakh region and comes under Tso Moriri wetland sanctuary
Mighty mountains, snow-capped peaks, lush green fields and the deep blue water stretching to the horizon, Tso Moriri offers it all.
Have dinner and Overnight stay at Guesthouse in Tso-Moriri.

days.title: Tsomoriri to Leh
activities: After Breakfast, check out from Camps for the return journey to Leh. Enroute take a short halt at Changla Pass and visit Hemis Monastery & 3-Idiots School.
Return to Leh in the evening.
Dinner and overnight stay at Leh.

days.title: Leh Sightseeing & Rest Day
activities: Have your breakfast with beautiful views of Leh. Today, We will cover remaining sightseeing of Leh.

Firstly you will go for peaceful Thiksey Monastery afterwards we will move towards the former palace of the royal family of Leh - Leh Palace, Ladakh famous - Shanti Stupa and buy some souvenirs from Leh Market.
In the evening come back to your stay for dinner.
Overnight stay in your hotel.
days.highlight: Thiksey Monastery, Leh Palace, Shanti stupa

days.title: Leh to Jispa
activities: Start early Morning after Breakfast, head towards Jispa. It will take 9 hours to reach Jispa. You will pass through Zing Zing bar and Sarchu. Later on continue to Jispa.
Jispa is located on 10,500 feet above the sea level. It's a little and calm village. You can buy good hand made handicraft items in jispa local market.
Late evening you will reach to Jispa. On arrival do check-in formalities and enjoy dinner in your campsite with beautiful view of Bhaga river.
Overnight stay at Jispa.
days.highlight: Zing Zing bar, local market exploration at Jispa, Bhaga river

days.title: Jispa to Kaza via Chatru
activities: After early breakfast you will transfer to Kaza . You will cross Keylong, Tandi bridge, Pagal Nallah, Khoksar, Chatru and Gramphu en route.

Kaza is the biggest and well developed town in Spiti valley. Located in the Trans-Himalayan region of India at an elevation of 3,800 meters. It is surrounded by high mountains, crystal clear river and barren landscapes intermix with green landscapes and meadows.
In evening you will reach Kaza. Do check-in formalities and have some rest. In free time you can roam around Your hotel and can explore local market of Kaza. Have dinner overnight stay in your hotel.

days.title: Kaza (Langza - Komic - Hikkim)
activities: Start our day after breakfast and start sightseeing Our first stop will be Langza (Fossil Village), famous for the big Buddha Statue & Fossils of marine creatures and plants, visit en route Komic and 18 km from Kaza. Spend some time at Komic, the highest inhabited village in the world. Get clicking with the locals and spend some time at the monastery.  Later start your journey to Hikkim, the highest post office in the world, which is about 5 km from Komic. Send postcards to your near and dear ones. In evening head back to Kaza.
Dinner and Night stay at Kaza.

days.title: Kaza (Dhankar via Pin Valley - Tabo - Mud - Gue)
activities: After breakfast we'll be visiting Kungri Monastery in Pin valley and then head towards Mud Village. We'll also be visiting 1021 years old Tabo Monastery, which is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. After Lunch, we'll be going to Gue Village, which houses a 500 years old mummy. We'll be ending our day at Dhankar and visiting Dhankar Monastery. In evening head back to Kaza.
Dinner and overnight stay at Kaza.
days.highlight: Kungri Monastery, Gue Village, Dhankar Monastery,

days.title: Kaza to Chandrataal Lake via Kibber - Kee Monastery and Chicham
activities: Head towards one of the most scenic lakes in India, i.e., Chandra Tal also called as Moon Lake via Kunzum Pass and Losar. The lake is beautiful, surrounded by mountains and is situated at an altitude of 4300 meters. Enjoy the views, get yourself clicked with the lake and spend some leisure time. En Route we'll be stopping at Kee Monastery which is the largest monastery in the entire Spiti Valley. We'll also be visiting Kibber, which is one of the highest motorable village in the world and Chicham Khab Bridge which is the highest bridge in Asia at a height of 13,500 + fts.
Return to the campsite before sunset and if the skies are clear, wait for an amazing sunset on CB12 (Chandra Bhagha 12).
Dinner and overnight stay in camps at Chandra Taal.
days.highlight: Chandra Tal , Kee Monastery, Chicham bridge, CB12 (Chandra Bhagha 12)

days.title: Chandrataal to Manali
activities: Today is the last day of our tour and we will start for Manali early in the morning after breakfast.

You are already familiar with the route it's the same we took on day two, crossing Bada Darra, Chota Darra and Rohtang Pass to finally reach Manali by late afternoon. On arrival done check - in formalities and have some rest. You can experience night life of Mall Road in evening, come back to your hotel for dinner. Overnight stay in hotel.

days.title: Manali Departure
activities: You will depart this day with lot's of memories of Himachal and Ladakh.
Enjoy your breakfast and check out from the hotel.
And viola! Tour ends here.
